_comment: VERIFIED deep ticket/event pages, scraped from each VENUE'S OWN programme page. Purpose: the calendar ships many ticket links pointing at a venue's bare HOMEPAGE, so a reader who clicks 'Tickets' lands on a splash page and has to hunt for the show. Measured on the live site 15 Jul 2026: 20 of 46 ticketed events (43%) did not reach a buying page. build_site.py's venue_resolve() upgrades a homepage/listing link to the real event page using ONLY entries verified here. NEVER hand-guess a slug (Marenostrum: 'beele-nanpabasico-lewispotter', 'underworld-live-satisfaxion-303' - not derivable). No verified match => the calendar's own link is left untouched. Regenerated by Tools/agent/refresh_venue_map.py.

starlite.note: VERIFICATION ONLY - Starlite ticket LINKS are handled by eci_starlite_map.json (which also price-compares the two sellers). PRIMARY source is starlitefestival.com/en/line-up-2026/ (the official festival lineup page) — the ticket section page (entradas.starlitemarbella.com/section/conciertos-en-auditorio-4nki) is a SECONDARY source only, as it can miss events that sell through a direct event URL rather than the section listing (e.g. Soleá Morente 8 Aug was absent from the section page but is confirmed on the lineup page with its own ticket URL). The union of all three sources is the authoritative programme. Beret is on ECI but not the box office; Nina Pastori and Nil Moliner y Alvaro de Luna are on the box office but not ECI. CORRECTED 2026-07-15: 'Solea Morente + Yerai Cortes + Estrella Morente' (8 Aug) was wrongly dropped as phantom — it IS on starlitefestival.com/en/line-up-2026/ at https://entradas.starlitemarbella.com/event/solea-morente-yerai-cortes-y-estrella-morente-6e4njg.

alvaro de luna y nil moliner.venue_name: Álvaro de Luna y Nil Moliner

nil moliner y alvaro de luna.venue_name: Nil Moliner y Alvaro de Luna

estrella morente.venue_name: Soleá Morente, Yerai Cortés & Estrella Morente

marbella arena.note: LINK ONLY - no 'complete' flag, so this venue can never delete an event. We hold one verified event page, not Marbella Arena's whole programme. UB40's calendar link pointed at Ticketmaster's ARTIST hub, which lists 20 tour dates worldwide (Keighley, Baltimore, Dublin, Glasgow...) and makes the reader hunt for the Marbella night - on our most prominent tile. Ticketmaster's own artist page gives the event: 16 Jul 2026 20:30, Marbella Arena. NOTE: Ticketmaster says 20:30, our calendar says 20:00.

marenostrum._eci: MARENOSTRUM SELLS THROUGH EL CORTE INGLES (verified 16 Jul 2026): its own COMPRAR AHORA button posts to checkoutentradas.elcorteingles.es. Same seller = the price CANNOT differ, so the gate passes by construction and every one of these routes to ECI for 1% (Awin 13034). Spot-checked: Alejandro Sanz 71,50 on both. The checkout URL itself carries an expiring JWT and is NOT linkable - always link the ECI event page below, which eci_aff() wraps. Prices here are ECI's 'Desde' read 16 Jul 2026.
marenostrum.note: The homepage lists the whole 2026 season with per-event deep links and dates. Acts NOT on this list are not playing this venue - see Thirty Seconds to Mars (15 Jul) and Maria Pelae (6 Aug), both of which our calendar carried but the venue does not list.

alejandro sanz.why: ECI is Marenostrum's own seller; 71,50 both. NOTE: Marenostrum's page says SOLD OUT while ECI still shows COMPRAR - ECI may hold the last stock.

hombres g.why: ECI is the seller -> 1%. ECI lists TWO Hombres G pages that night: the standard one (51,00, used here) and a MAREVIP package (119,00). Standard = the cheaper, correct target.

mago orbit.venue_name: MAGO ORBIT PRESENTA ACERO 2.0 – SOHAIL MÁGICO

101musicfestival.note: Each act's ENTRADAS button goes to malagaentradas.com with a per-event eid - THAT is the buying page, not 101musicfestival.es. WARNING: 101's own page repeats its lineup twice and the SECOND block mislabels Loquillo with Aguilera y Mení's eid (3550). We use the FIRST block's eid=3547 (loquillo-corazones-legendarios), which matches the act name in the URL. Acts NOT on this lineup are not part of 101 Music Festival - our calendar carried Vetusta Morla (20 Jul) linked to this site, but 101's 2026 lineup is only Marta Santos 16, Aguilera y Mení 17, Loquillo 18, Il Volo 19, El Arrebato 25, Mónica Naranjo 31.
101musicfestival._gate: PRICE-GATED like Starlite (DLR 2026-07-16). ECI resells the whole 101 line-up, and eci_aff() wraps elcorteingles.es into the Awin deep link = 1.00% 'Conciertos y festivales'. malagaentradas.com is NOT an affiliate we hold, so those links earn ZERO. Both sellers' CHEAPEST zone was read by hand on 16 Jul 2026 and they are IDENTICAL on every act - ECI never costs the reader more here, so 'url' points at ECI and the malagaentradas page is kept in box_url as the record. Re-check prices before trusting this: if ECI ever goes dearer, flip url back to box_url. Never trade the reader's money for 1%.

marta santos.note: PAST (16 Jul, today is 17 Jul) - not price-checked, left on malagaentradas.

loquillo.why: same price (49,50 both; box zones 49,50/55,00/71,50) -> earns 1%

il volo.why: same price (61,60 both; box zones 61,60-132,00) -> earns 1%

el arrebato.why: same price (38,50 both; box zones 38,50/44,00/55,00) -> earns 1%

monica naranjo.why: same price (60,50 both; box zones 60,50/66,00/88,00) -> earns 1%

brisafestival.note: Brisa has NO per-day event pages - one festival-wide cart (its own COMPRAR ENTRADAS button), so every act shares it. 'complete': the site publishes its ENTIRE three-day bill, so an act absent from this list is not playing Brisa. Full line-up read 15 Jul 2026 - Thu 23 Jul: Love of Lesbian, Barry B, David Otero, Hot Chip DJ Set, Monte Ventura, Pequeno Mal, Pilu, Something About Tsunamis. Fri 24 Jul: Amaia, Siloe, Leon Benavente, Merino, Samurai, Sarria, Solea Morente, Corazon Inverso, Maenoba, Sara Rais, Scandinavia, Vis Viva, Wasabi Cru. Sat 25 Jul: M-Clan, La M.O.D.A., OBK, Angel Stanich, Javypablo, Pignoise, Sienna, La Trinidad, Anadie, Bravo Bravo, Guarino, Idaira Siles, Nina Raku, RBT, The Ripples. NOTE: Solea Morente IS real here on 24 Jul - it is the separate 8 Aug Starlite booking that is phantom.

operabenalmadena.note: JS-rendered, read in a browser 15 Jul 2026. Listed here for VERIFICATION, not linking: its full programme is Cabaret 2.0 15-31/07, Pink Floyd Experience 17-18/07, La Verbena de la Paloma 18-19/07, Woodstock 1969 25-26/07, Queen Sinfonico 26/07, Opera Don Giovanni 01/08, Hipnosis de Comedia 02/08, Rea Danza 03/08, David Navarro 06/08, Tributo Michael Jackson 07/08, K-Pop Fever 08/08, Aretha Franklin Sinfonico 09/08, Born This Way 14/08, Jose Tejada 16/08, Noche Flamenca 22-23/08, La Granja 23/08, Soul on Fire from 23/08, Jose Tejada Hipnomagia 28/08. Our calendar carried ABBA Live TV (24/07) and Zimmer Sinfonico (02/08) at this venue - NEITHER is on it (24/07 has no event at all; 02/08 is Hipnosis de Comedia).

teatro del soho.note: READ BOTH SEASONS, 16 Jul 2026. The bare /programacion/ page is an ALL-SEASONS archive with no years on the dates ('18 - 19 Jul') - unusable. The ?temporada= filter fixes that: it returns ONE season, and the year is then derivable because a Soho season runs Sep->Jul, so Sep-Dec = the FIRST year of the label and Jan-Aug = the SECOND. Gershwin '18 - 19 Jul' in temporada-2025-2026 = 18-19 Jul 2026. Verified against the live calendar, which carries it on exactly those dates. Soho sells through ECI directly (its own 'Compra de entradas' points at elcorteingles.es/entradas/microsites/teatro-soho/), so eci_aff() wraps these and they earn 1% with no price gate needed - same seller, same price. Only the in/near-window entries are listed; the rest of both seasons is past or months out. IF SOHO ANNOUNCES A NEW SHOW, ADD IT HERE: this venue is 'complete', so an event absent from this list is DELETED as a phantom.

gershwin in blue.venue_name: Gershwin in blue - Larios Pop del Soho (18-19 Jul)

chungo.venue_name: Chungo - Luis Zahera (5-6 Oct, next season)

purolatino.note: Puro Latino TORREMOLINOS = the only Puro Latino in our region (the festival also runs Madrid/Sevilla/Almeria/Puerto de Santa Maria - do NOT match those). Two nights, verified 16 Jul 2026: Fri 17 Jul Farruko/Nengo Flow/ROA/Tito El Bambino/Alvama Ice/Cyril Kamer; Sat 18 Jul Anuel AA/JC Reyes/Juan Magan/Omar Montes/SAIKO/Kidd Voodoo. ADDED because the 13 Jul sweep dropped both nights and nothing detected it - this venue was unmapped. No per-day page; /torremolinos/entradas/ is the buying page.

anuel aa.venue_name: Puro Latino Torremolinos Día 2 - Anuel AA

moonlight.note: Malaga Forum concert series. Whole 2026 line-up is these TWO nights (read 16 Jul 2026). ADDED because the 13 Jul sweep SILENTLY DROPPED BOTH - including TOM JONES, a MARQUEE act - and nothing detected it: the missing-events check only judges venues flagged 'complete', and this venue was not mapped. Deep links are the venue's own per-artist pages.

dreambeach.note: No per-artist pages; the festival sells day tickets (/entradasdedia/, from EUR49) and passes (/abonos/). Day tickets are the right target for a single-night listing. Dreambeach's own news copy confirms 31 Jul + 1 Aug at Vélez-Málaga, matching our Eric Prydz and David Guetta rows.
